title: EdgarTools Universe Dashboard
scope_summary: Setup and usage guide for the standalone Streamlit dashboard that queries the Snowflake EDGARTOOLS_GOLD layer. Covers prerequisites, configuration, six dashboard sections, and known caveats.
key_requirements: Snowflake role with SELECT on EDGARTOOLS_DEV.EDGARTOOLS_GOLD.* and USAGE on a warehouse
~/.snowflake/config.toml with a connection block pointing to EDGARTOOLS_DEV / EDGARTOOLS_GOLD
key_constraints: Maps aggregate at country/US-state granularity only — no lat/lon in the gold layer
ADVISER_OFFICES.geography_key is an unresolved surrogate; adviser office geography section not yet plottable
All Streamlit queries are cached for 1 hour
